request_payload.exposure_text: As a former cybersecurity advisor to NATO, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are in countering modern threats. The recent cyberattack on our critical infrastructure underscores why we can't afford to weaken our commitments. Trusted partners share the burden, and isolation leaves us vulnerable. #StrongerTogether #CyberSecurity
